I do not know what name to refer to him by


He is called Ioannes von Sancy but I think this is completely in error

Evidence for his existence is the wikipedia article of his father<ref name=":0">https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anastasius_(consul_517)</ref>

[Anastasius] was married to the [[Theodora (wife of Justinian I)|Empress Theodora]]'s illegitimate daughter, whose name has not survived. They had at least three children, John ({{q|Q59740}}), Athenasius({{q|Q153781}}), and Anastasius ({{q|Q109603}}), who was briefly married to [[Ioannina (daughter of Belisarius)|Ioannina]], the daughter of general [[Belisarius]] and [[Antonina (wife of Belisarius)|Antonina]].<ref>{{Cite book|last=Cameron|first=Alan|title=House of Anastasius|date=1977|publisher=Duke University|pages=18}}</ref><ref name=":0" />


== References ==
<references />

== Sources ==
* https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anastasius_%28consul_517%29
* 5. Syriac Historia Ecclesiastica of John of Ephesus (German transl., p55): "The blessed John, who was sprung from the family of the Emperor Anastasius and also was a son of the Empress Theodora's daughter."
* Alan Cameron. Duke University, Greek, Roman and Byzantine Studies The House of Anastasius. Columbia University, pp 259-276. June 1978. Page 270. Accessed 9 April 2020. https://grbs.library.duke.edu/article/viewFile/7451/4919 page 17 of PDF

* https://gw.geneanet.org/feoullon?lang=en&pz=alessio+alain+heribert+debras+foullon+debras&nz=foullon+debras&p=iohannes&n=de+rom
[[Category:Pages]]
